items.title: US Conviction List - Directors' Cut: June 2026 Update - Three Years On
items.summary: We add Casella Waste Systems Inc (CWST), TPG Inc (TPG), Tyson Foods Inc (TSN), and Block Inc (XYZ) to the US Conviction List, while removing Ares Management Corp (ARES), Kontoor Brands Inc (KTB), and Wynn Resorts Ltd (WYNN).

items.title: Price Target Update: LINE and HPP
